name: QFINHUB Autonomous Daily Business OS
why_no_run: UNKNOWN — cron was enabled and scheduled but the scheduler never executed it. Possible causes: (1) scheduler tick missed the window, (2) cron daemon restart needed, (3) dependency/skill load failure prevented launch, (4) the cron was created at 00:08 with schedule '0 15 * * *' but 'next_run_at' showed '2026-06-05T15:00:00+03:00' — it SHOULD have fired.
recommendation: Do NOT rely on cron auto-run. Manually trigger Phase 15 workflow during this emergency session. After fixing, verify cron fires tomorrow by monitoring next_run_at.
